# Feature: MVE Empty Text Block Shell Width

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-06-26 — follow-up to mve-line-duration-width -->

## Intent

Empty MVE text blocks must be visible on the timeline. The first empty block in a scene fills the scene container width; additional empty blocks use a fixed default shell duration. Empty blocks must not shrink the scene to 1 s on create. No placeholder text in persisted data.

## Preconditions

- Local desktop, audio project, dialog lane with Plus → text block
- Scene with visible structure container on timeline

## Happy Path

- [x] First empty text block in scene spans full scene width (startSec → scene endSec)
- [x] Second empty text block in same scene uses default shell width (~5 s), stacked after prior lines
- [x] Creating sole empty block does not shrink scene to 1 s _(unit: `maxContentEndSecInScene`; full timeline not browser-tested)_
- [x] After user types text, block width follows WPM estimate _(QA harness: 10 words ≈ 80px @ 20px/s)_
- [ ] Scene sync (contentDriven) shrinks only when at least one line has non-empty text _(logic in code; not E2E in Tauri)_

## Edge Cases

- [x] First block empty (full scene) + second empty block added → first stays full scene, second is shell width
- [x] All lines empty → scene end never below current scene container end _(unit test)_

## Regression

- [x] WPM width with text unchanged _(QA harness + unit tests)_
- [ ] Audio bind + exact clip duration unchanged _(not in this verify-ui run)_
- [ ] Multi-line sequential stacking unchanged _(unit tests only)_

## Assumptions

- `DEFAULT_EMPTY_LINE_SHELL_SEC = 5`
- “First line” = lowest orderIndex among text-only lines in scene

## Screenshots

| Step | Filename |
|------|----------|
| 1 | `01-empty-first-full-scene.png` |
| 2 | `02-second-empty-shell.png` |

## Implementation Notes

- `resolve-mve-line-span.ts`: `DEFAULT_EMPTY_LINE_SHELL_SEC`, first empty = full scene, additional empty = shell
- `maxContentEndSecInScene`: all-empty lines preserve `sceneBlock.endSec` (no 1 s shrink)
- Tests updated in `resolve-mve-line-span.test.ts`
- QA harness: `/#qa-mve-empty-text-block-shell`, spec `.qa/runs/2026-06-26-mve-empty-text-block-shell.spec.ts`

## verify-ui (2026-06-26)

- Playwright PASS on QA harness (port 3001, `VITE_SCRIPTONY_ALLOW_BROWSER_LOCAL=1`)
- Evidence: `.qa/evidence/mve-empty-text-block-shell/`
- Tauri full timeline + Plus flow: not run (PARTIAL)
